narrative:
Clay Township has 6,282 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
